summary: Completed testing of Orientation Identity Layer. All backend tests pass (21/21). Frontend correctly shows identity section with label, description, icon, insight, and expandable details. Layout order verified: Compass → Identity → Decision Path. New user gets 'מתחיל מסע' (Starting Journey) identity type correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Backend /api/orientation/identity/{user_id} returns all required fields: identity_type, identity_label, identity_description, is_warning_state
GOOD: Backend computes identity based on dominant_direction, momentum, time_in_direction, avoidance_ratio, previous_dominant
GOOD: Avoidance loop detection works - triggers is_warning_state=true when avoidance_ratio >= 40% or avoidance count >= 3 with 5+ total actions
GOOD: Backend saves orientation_snapshots to database (upsert per day per user)
GOOD: All identity types supported: avoidance_loop, recovery_dominant, order_builder, contribution_oriented, exploration_driven, recovery_to_contribution, drifting_from_order, balanced, new_user
GOOD: Hebrew labels and descriptions for all identity types
GOOD: Momentum values validated: stabilizing, drifting, shifting, stable
GOOD: direction_counts includes all 6 directions: recovery, order, contribution, exploration, harm, avoidance
GOOD: Frontend OrientationIdentitySection component shows identity icon, label, description, momentum badge
GOOD: Frontend shows warning banner with red/orange gradient + warning icon + supportive Hebrew text for avoidance_loop
GOOD: Frontend shows stats row with dominant direction and time_in_direction
GOOD: Frontend has expandable details with direction distribution bar chart
GOOD: Layout order correct: Compass → Identity → Decision Path on home tab
GOOD: data-testid attributes present for all key elements: orientation-identity-section, identity-label, identity-description, warning-banner, identity-insight, identity-details
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users with various histories to verify identity computation: avoidance users, recovery dominant users, order builder users, contribution oriented users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Orientation Identity Layer fully tested. New users get identity_type='new_user' with label 'מתחיל מסע'. Avoidance loop triggers when avoidance_ratio >= 40% OR avoidance count >= 3 with total_actions >= 5, setting is_warning_state=true. Frontend conditionally shows warning banner with red gradient and supportive Hebrew messages. Backend saves daily snapshots to orientation_snapshots collection. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_orientation_identity.py.

backend_tests.test_response_has_required_fields: PASS - success, user_id, identity_type, identity_label, identity_description, is_warning_state
backend_tests.test_response_has_computation_fields: PASS - dominant_direction, momentum, time_in_direction, avoidance_ratio, previous_dominant

frontend_tests.warning_banner_hidden_for_non_avoidance: PASS - no warning banner for new user

new_user.identity_description: ברוך הבא! אתה בתחילת המסע שלך.
new_user.insight: כל מסע מתחיל בצעד אחד. התחל עם פעולת התאוששות.

avoidance_loop_user.identity_description: נראה שאתה בדפוס של הימנעות. זה בסדר - זיהוי זה הצעד הראשון לשינוי.
avoidance_loop_user.insight: הימנעות היא תגובה טבעית. הצעד הבא הוא ליצור מבנה קטן.

identity_types_verified: avoidance_loop - triggers is_warning_state=true with red styling
